creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've uploaded kdesupport.diff that includes updates for akonadi, phonon, qzeitgeist and a fix for cmake:
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kdesupport.diff

New patches for KDE SC 4.8.2 and Qt4.8.1:
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kde-4.8.2.diff
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/qt-4.8.1.diff

The patch for PyQt is the same:
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/pyqt-4.9.1.diff

Cheers,
Max
